mapper.select: select id, category, item_code, item_label, sort_order, is_system, is_enabled, remark from enum_configs order by category, sort_order, id
select id, category, item_code, item_label, sort_order, is_system, is_enabled, remark from enum_configs where category = #{category} order by sort_order, id
select distinct category from enum_configs order by category
select category, COUNT(*) as itemCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_enabled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enabledCount from enum_configs group by category order by category
mapper.insert: insert into enum_configs(category, item_code, item_label, sort_order, is_system, is_enabled, remark) values(#{category}, #{itemCode}, #{itemLabel}, #{sortOrder}, #{isSystem}, #{isEnabled}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update enum_configs set item_label = #{itemLabel}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id} and is_system = 0
mapper.delete: delete from enum_configs where id = #{id} and is_system = 0
